scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir ../contracts build && pnpm --dir ../runtime-state build && pnpm --dir ../core build && pnpm --dir ../importers build && pnpm --dir ../device-syncd build && pnpm --dir ../query build && pnpm --dir ../inboxd build && pnpm --dir ../parsers build && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --pretty false
scripts.test: pnpm --dir ../contracts build && pnpm --dir ../core build && pnpm --dir ../importers build && pnpm --dir ../device-syncd build && pnpm --dir ../query build && pnpm --dir ../inboxd build && pnpm --dir ../parsers build && pnpm build && tsx ./scripts/verify-package-shape.ts && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run packages/cli/test/health-tail.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-harness.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-state.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-provider.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-codex.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-channel.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-runtime.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-cli.test.ts packages/cli/test/assistant-cron.test.ts packages/cli/test/device-daemon.test.ts packages/cli/test/incur-smoke.test.ts packages/cli/test/canonical-mutation-boundary.test.ts packages/cli/test/inbox-incur-smoke.test.ts packages/cli/test/runtime.test.ts packages/cli/test/inbox-cli.test.ts packages/cli/test/inbox-model-harness.test.ts packages/cli/test/inbox-model-route.test.ts packages/cli/test/search-runtime.test.ts packages/cli/test/setup-cli.test.ts packages/cli/test/release-script-coverage-audit.test.ts packages/cli/test/release-workflow-guards.test.ts --no-coverage --maxWorkers 1
